hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*cat\ *|*head\ *|*tail\ *|*awk\ *|*sed\ *|*less\ *) [ -f .graphify/graph.json ] && echo 'MANDATORY: .graphify/graph.json exists. Run npx graphify query before reading source files: npx graphify query "<your question>"' || true ;; esac
